title: Rename app title to 'GAME BAZAR'

requirements.text: Update the app title/branding displayed in the header (Layout.tsx logo/title text) and the HTML page title (frontend/index.html <title> tag) from the current name ('GameVault' / 'GameAccount Marketplace') to 'GAME BAZAR'. The selected element is the <h1> in the main browse page hero banner — update that text to 'GAME BAZAR' as well. Ensure all visible instances of the old app name across the UI are replaced with 'GAME BAZAR'.
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'GAME BAZAR'.
The sticky header logo/title text reads 'GAME BAZAR'.
The hero banner <h1> on the Browse page reads 'GAME BAZAR'.
No visible instance of the old app name ('GameVault', 'GameAccount Marketplace', or similar) remains in the UI.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not change any backend logic, data models, or admin principal values.
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme, colors, or layout.
Updating the admin principal or authentication logic.
